programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jared Goff passed for career highs of 465 yards and five touchdowns, winning a scintillating duel with his Minnesota counterpart and leading unbeaten Los Angeles to a 38-31 victory on Thursday night.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.desc: Head coach Mike Smith and a roster of 90 players begin training camp in Flowery Branch, Ga.; the team goes through the first week of on-field drills in preparation for the upcoming season.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.desc: General manager Thomas Dimitroff discusses the 2014 roster; profile of linebacker Sean Weatherspoon; the Falcons scrimmage with the Tennessee Titans; the Falcons play their opening preseason game against the Miami Dolphins.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.desc: Training camp heats up with jobs on the line; the Falcons take on the Texans in two mid-week scrimmages; the team plays their second preseason game; competition for the backup quarterback job intensifies.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.desc: Fifteen players are cut from the team; veteran players prepare for the regular season; a thunderstorm sends the team heading for cover.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Atlanta Falcons
programme.desc: The Falcons travel to Jacksonville to take on the Jaguars; coaches evaluate player performances as they prepare to make cuts to finalize the 53-man roster.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: Raiders linebacker Carl Nassib comes out as gay and helps transform lives, and Super Bowl champion Osi Umenyiora helps Nigerian prospects escape dramatic hardships.

programme.title: NFL Films Presents
programme.sub-title: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, Vince Lombardi - Pride Month
programme.desc: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, and Vince Lombardi are LGBTQ+ allies in sports, advocating for visibility and acceptance. Celebrate their contributions during Pride Month.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals
programme.desc: This Pride Month, the NFL honors Richard Fierro for his acts of bravery as he and other survivors of the shooting share their stories of healing, the importance of safe spaces and their hope for unity in the future.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Top 60 Super Bowl Plays in NFL History
programme.desc: Countdown the top 60 Super Bowl plays in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Brett Kollmann breaks down how the Butt Fumble was caused by events that took place 36 years prior.

programme.title: NFL Throwback

programme.desc: He's not only one of the best 49ers of all time but also one of the league's greatest linebackers. Join Patrick Willis on a journey throughout his illustrious career.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Witness the most incredible individual performances over the span of a single season.

programme.title: NFL Throwback

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Seahawks overcame a 17-point deficit in the second half as Seattle scored 20 unanswered points ending with a Hauschka 45-yard field goal to win 23-20 over Texans.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Adrian Peterson raced for the game-sealing touchdown midway through the fourth quarter, padding his NFL rushing lead with 171 yards on 27 carries for the Vikings in a 34-24 victory over the Lions.
